---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new example, tool, or improvement
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

### What type of feature?

- [ ] New FPGA example
- [ ] New firmware feature
- [ ] Tooling improvement (ShrikeFlash, shrike-ctl, CI)
- [ ] Hardware documentation
- [ ] Other

### Board(s) this applies to

- [ ] All boards
- [ ] Shrike-Lite (RP2040)
- [ ] Shrike (RP2350)
- [ ] Shrike-fi (ESP32-S3)

### Describe the feature

<!-- What do you want to see? Be as specific as possible. -->


### Why is this useful?

<!-- What problem does it solve? Who benefits from it? -->


### Are you willing to contribute this?

- [ ] Yes, I can submit a PR
- [ ] I can help with testing
- [ ] No, just suggesting

### Reference links

<!-- Any datasheets, articles, similar projects, or examples that might help -->
